stories.intro: US clears powerful AI for export
stories.body: The Commerce Department has lifted export controls on Anthropic's most advanced models, a policy reversal with significant implications for the global spread of frontier AI and the escalating tech rivalry over
stories.link_text: who controls the most capable models.

stories.intro: Trans athletes barred from girls' sports
